PowerShell(Set-Location "C:\\Users\\jones\\OneDrive\\Research Assistant\\SUMMER\\1st Month Shiny App"; & "C:\\Program Files\\R\\R-4.5.1\\bin\\Rscript.exe" -e "options\(shiny.testmode=TRUE\); tryCatch\({ app <- shiny::shinyAppFile\('NBA 2026 Game.R'\); ui <- app\\$httpHandler; cat\('App object created OK\\n'\); u <- if \(is.function\(app\\$ui\)\) app\\$ui\(list\(\)\) else app\\$ui; cat\('UI built OK\\n'\) }, error=function\(e\) cat\('ERROR:', conditionMessage\(e\), '\\n'\)\)")

PowerShell(Set-Location "C:\\Users\\jones\\OneDrive\\Research Assistant\\SUMMER\\1st Month Shiny App"; $job = Start-Job -ScriptBlock { & "C:\\Program Files\\R\\R-4.5.1\\bin\\Rscript.exe" "C:\\Users\\jones\\OneDrive\\Research Assistant\\SUMMER\\1st Month Shiny App\\_diag2.R" 2>&1 }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 12; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:7777" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output \("HTTP STATUS: " + $r.StatusCode\) } catch { Write-Output \("REQUEST FAILED: " + $_.Exception.Message\) }; Stop-Job $job; Receive-Job $job; Remove-Job $job)
